creator: omatsuda000@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Tijl Coosemans from comment #2)

The printer is LBP-7200CN which requires a CAPT (Canon Advanced Printing Technology) driver.  I don't think it speaks PCL.  For this, I'm using a LINUX driver (linux-capt-sources-260.tar.gz)  modified according to some web information. (Unfortunately, the web page seems to have been gone)  gs with opvp driver is invoked by the main filter "pstocapt3".  

To be honest, this printer is really a nightmare.
